title: DT_MapObjectAssignData
description: Palworld DataTable DT_MapObjectAssignData (row struct: PalMapObjectAssignData). Each PalSchema mod patch targeting "DT_MapObjectAssignData" is an object of rowName -> partial row; this schema validates one such row. Palworld 1.0. Field names verified against the current game's row struct (localcc/PalworldModdingKit@62fad41, pushed 2026-07-11); types inferred from game data (Jan-2024 dump) for long-standing fields and mapped from C++ for newer ones. Fields are optional (partial patches).
$comment: palschema-hub | table=DT_MapObjectAssignData | rowStruct=PalMapObjectAssignData | palworldVersion=1.0 | fields=22 | source=paldex-dump+sdk-headers | sdk=localcc/PalworldModdingKit@62fad41 | sdkAdded=bBaseCampWorkerWorkable,WorkableTribeIDs,WorkableSizeMin,WorkableSizeMax,AffectFullStomachValue,MultiWorkSuitability1,MultiWorkType1,MultiWorkActionType1,MultiRequiredRank1,MultiWorkSuitability2,MultiWorkType2,MultiWorkActionType2,MultiRequiredRank2

WorkSuitability.description: Enum-like value. Examples: EPalWorkSuitability::None, EPalWorkSuitability::Handcraft, EPalWorkSuitability::EmitFlame, EPalWorkSuitability::Anyone

bBaseCampWorkerWorkable.description: BoolProperty — current-game field (absent from Jan-2024 dump), verified from SDK headers
